title: Junior Frontend Developer
description: Join our product team building delightful React interfaces for our B2B SaaS platform. You'll work alongside senior engineers shipping features used by 10,000+ daily active users.
responsibilities: Build and maintain React components in our design system
Collaborate with product and design on new features
Write unit and integration tests using Jest and React Testing Library
Participate in code review and technical discussions
requirements: 1-2 years of experience with React and TypeScript
Familiarity with REST APIs and async JavaScript
Basic understanding of CSS and responsive design
Strong communication skills and eagerness to learn

title: Backend Engineer
description: Design and build scalable microservices powering our real-time logistics platform. Our backend handles 50M+ events per day across 12 services.
responsibilities: Build and maintain Python/FastAPI microservices
Design database schemas in PostgreSQL and Redis
Write comprehensive tests and API documentation
Participate in on-call rotation and incident response
requirements: 3-5 years of backend development experience
Proficiency in Python and at least one other backend language
Experience with PostgreSQL, Redis, and message queues (Kafka or RabbitMQ)
Understanding of REST and gRPC API design

title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
description: Lead ML system design for our personalization engine, which generates recommendations for 5M+ monthly users. You'll own the full lifecycle from research to production.
responsibilities: Design and implement ML pipelines using PyTorch and Ray
Collaborate with researchers to productionize new models
Optimize inference latency and model serving infrastructure
Mentor junior engineers and contribute to team technical direction
requirements: 5+ years of ML engineering experience with production deployments
Deep expertise in PyTorch or TensorFlow
Experience with feature stores, model registries, and A/B testing
Strong background in distributed systems and cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP)

title: Staff Platform Engineer
description: Define the internal developer platform strategy for an 800-person engineering org. You'll set the standard for how engineers build, deploy, and operate services at scale.
responsibilities: Architect the internal developer platform across CI/CD, observability, and service mesh
Lead cross-team technical initiatives and drive consensus on standards
Build tooling that improves engineering velocity across the org

requirements: 8+ years of engineering experience, with 3+ in platform or infrastructure roles
Deep expertise in Kubernetes, Terraform, and cloud-native tooling

Strong communication skills; experience influencing without authority

title: Principal Software Architect
description: Drive the technical vision for our next-generation trading platform, processing $2B+ in daily transactions. You will set architectural direction across 6 engineering teams.
responsibilities: Define system architecture for high-availability, low-latency financial systems

requirements: 12+ years of software engineering, with 5+ in architecture roles
Deep expertise in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and financial systems
Proven track record of architecting systems at scale (>1M TPS)
Excellent communication and executive stakeholder management skills

title: VP of Engineering
description: Lead a 120-person engineering organization building healthcare SaaS products used by 3,000+ clinics nationwide. You will own the engineering culture, hiring strategy, and technical roadmap.
responsibilities: Lead, grow, and develop 120 engineers across 8 teams

requirements: 15+ years in software engineering, with 5+ in VP or Director roles
Proven experience scaling engineering organizations from 50 to 150+ people
Deep understanding of healthcare compliance (HIPAA) preferred

title: DevOps Engineer

responsibilities: Manage AWS infrastructure using Terraform and CloudFormation
Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions

requirements: 3+ years of DevOps or cloud infrastructure experience
Proficiency with AWS services (EC2, EKS, RDS, S3, CloudFront)

title: Engineering Manager
